processing.background: flat chroma key sampled from border

shared_prompt_constraints: One isolated full-body 2D game boss sprite; dark post-apocalyptic cartoon arcade style; elevated top-down view aligned to the screen-cardinal axes with controlled body depth; facing screen-right; no isometric floor plane or diamond base; bold near-black outline; crisp cel shading; chunky readable silhouette; generous padding; no shadow, floor, environment, UI, text, watermark or loose VFX; uniform flat #FF00FF chroma-key background with no magenta on the subject.

assets.subject_prompt: Chunky graveyard colossus zombie carrying a massive tombstone on its back and a rusted executioner cleaver, cracked stone armor, chains and cyan corpse glow; moss green, granite gray, rust brown and cyan palette.

Hulking undead zombie built low and wide in an aggressive forward lean, enormous curved ram horns, cracked bone armor plates and powerful charging legs; dried blood, bone, charcoal, ember and corpse-green palette.
Asymmetrical pear-shaped undead zombie with swollen translucent toxic sacs, nozzle-like distended jaw, thin braced legs and hooked claws; tar teal, corpse green, toxic lime and acid-yellow palette.

Tall triangular undead artillery zombie whose spine and rib cage form a dorsal bone mortar, with braced tripod-like legs, vertebra ammunition and skull-like aiming head; indigo, aged bone, gunmetal and warning-orange palette.

Lanky undead zombie herder with a long curved butcher scythe, clustered carrion-spore pods, elongated limbs and a sinister shepherd silhouette; bruised violet, corpse olive, old bone, amber and cold-cyan palette.
